name: Set of 2 Lissette Counter Height Barstools Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Bonded Leather, Bronze Studs, Rubberwood Frame
description:
These comfortably soft, bonded leather counter stools are a perfect transitional piece from your kitchen to your living room. Bronze colored studs are featured along the edges of the seat and the black metal kickplate gives this stool a contemporary look.
ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for these Counter Stools. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
